name: Iso11783OPChangeChildPosition
title: Iso11783OPChangeChildPosition
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeChildPosition( dword ecuHandle, dword parentID, dword objectID, long x, long y );
description: The function changes the absolute position of an object inside its parent object. A Change Child Position command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
